_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulation of ERK signaling modulates GABA release and learning.

_contextSnippet: the ratio between mIPSC frequency recorded in 12.5mM KCl versus that in control solution (2.5 mM KCl) was significantly larger in Nf1+/− mice than in their WT littermates
details: Showed significantly increased mIPSC frequency ratio (12.5mM KCl vs 2.5mM KCl) compared to WT littermates, indicating enhanced GABA release under high frequency stimulation
